The '''Mission to Goratak III''' was fought early in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] between forces of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. The purpose of the mission was to capture an Imperial [[I2-CG droid/Legends|I2-CG]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]], which held critical information on Rebel [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] manufacturing operations on [[Tar Morden]]. [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] had gathered the information and sent it to the Intelligence Sector HQ in a [[Tech 4 PDV|Plexus Droid Vessel]]. En route, Rebels intercepted the ship, which subsequently self-destructed after ejecting the droid onto the planet [[Goratak III]].<ref name="CG" />

The Rebel strike team included [[Safari One]], [[Red Smoke]], and the [[Buzz Boys]] squads<ref name="CG" /> (one of which included the young [[Alliance Special Operations/Legends|SpecOps]] fighter [[Jodo Kast]]<ref name="HM" />), as well as Rebel sympathizers [[Grindol Maal]] and the [[Revwien/Legends|Revwien]] [[Tyia|Thuwisten]] [[Wuwuhuul]]. Fought in the [[Crystal Forests]], they encountered resistance from accomplished [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Feskitt Bobb]], who commanded two units of [[Cold assault stormtrooper|snowtroopers]] and was aided by a number of other, less experienced bounty hunters.<ref name="CG" />

During the course of the battle, Kast killed Bobb with a shot from his [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]], mistakenly believing it was [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] he had killed. Inspired by this event, Kast subsequently left Alliance Special Operations, acquired a set of [[Mandalorian armor/Legends|Mandalorian armor]] of his own, and set out as a bounty hunter.<ref name="HM" />
